profile.name: Sittinon Tongsua
profile.summary: Frontend-focused Full-Stack Developer with hands-on industry experience building enterprise and personal web applications. Previously interned at Bluebik Digital delivering a high-value transaction system. Strong foundation in UI engineering with working knowledge across the full stack — graduated First-Class Honours (GPAX 3.51) and received the Excellent Presentation Award at AUCC2025.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Sittinon Tongsua. Full-Stack Developer · Next.js · React · Node.js

projectsPage.metaDescription: Portfolio projects and internship work by Sittinon Tongsua.
projectsPage.description: Enterprise internship delivery and personal production projects focused on security, performance, and reusable architecture.

projects.title: High-Value Transaction System
projects.description: Built core User Management and Admin modules with strict RBAC, delivered 20+ reusable pixel-perfect components from Figma, and optimized global state + API flow with Zustand, TanStack Query, and Axios.

projects.title: Tiwgun (ติวกัน)
projects.description: A bilingual educational document-sharing platform with hybrid encryption (RSA-OAEP + AES-GCM), sub-second TTFB via RSC + caching strategies, and real-time capabilities through Supabase.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform & Expense Management System
projects.description: Built a full-stack e-commerce platform in a team of four, including relational database design for users, products, and transactions in an Agile workflow.

projects.title: CuteBooth
projects.description: An online photobooth-style web app built with Next.js for fun creative shoots and quick photo sessions.

projects.title: Saad Map
projects.description: A real-time crowdsourced interactive map for Songkran festival — pin water splashing spots, traffic jams, security checkpoints, events, and first aid stations with community-driven reliability filtering.

projects.title: Harkun — Expense Splitter
projects.description: A group expense-splitting app supporting equal, custom amount, and percentage-based splits. Features a smart settlement algorithm that minimizes transactions and shareable sessions via URL.

projects.title: Market Analysis Bot
projects.description: Automated financial analysis system that delivers 3× daily LINE reports covering stocks, gold, crypto, and Forex with full indicator suite (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, EMA, ATR), AI-powered Thai-language analysis via Groq LLaMA, and real-time price alerts.

projects.title: Sawasdee Wellness
projects.description: A wellness platform demo delivered as a Fastwork freelance project.

projects.title: Fitness Reward
projects.description: A fitness reward platform demo delivered as a Fastwork freelance project.

projects.title: React Concepts
projects.description: An exploration project for learning and experimenting with React and Next.js patterns and concepts.

skillsPage.ctaHeading: Ready to build something scalable together?

points: Built User Management and Admin modules with Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) per SA documentation.
Engineered reusable components from Figma mockups (Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI), cutting UI dev time ~30%.
Managed global state with Zustand; optimised fetching and caching with TanStack Query and Axios.
Implemented client-side validation using Zod schemas to prevent malformed API payloads.
Developed bilingual (EN/TH) educational platform with secure material sharing and discovery.
Implemented hybrid encryption (RSA-OAEP + AES-GCM) using Web Crypto API for enterprise-grade API security.
Achieved sub-second TTFB through React Server Components, granular caching strategies, and TanStack Query.
Developed full-stack e-commerce platform with Angular, Node.js, Express.js, and SQL Server.
Designed relational database schema for users, products, and transactions in Agile delivery cycles.
